name: GH_RhinoScriptInterface
summary: Plugin Interface object that is exposed via the RhinoScript layer.

constructors.name: GH_RhinoScriptInterface
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_RhinoScriptInterface class

methods.name: AssignDataToParameter
methods.signature: public bool AssignDataToParameter(string parameterID, Object data)
methods.summary: Find a parameter and assign some persistent data.

params.name: parameterID
params.doc: Instance ID of parameter or parameter name.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: BakeDataInObject
methods.summary: Find an object and bake all geometry inside of it.

returns.doc: An array of Rhino object IDs, or null on failure.

methods.name: CloseAllDocuments
methods.summary: Close all Grasshopper documents.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: CloseDocument
methods.summary: Close the currently active Grasshopper document. If there is not active document, nothing will happen.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: DisableBanner
methods.summary: Disables the display of the Grasshopper banner during Component loading. The banner is typically only shown once during a Grasshopper session, namely when the Editor is first loaded.

methods.name: DisableSolver
methods.summary: Disables the Grasshopper Solver. If the Solver is disabled, expired components and parameter will not be recomputed, though any existing solution will remain intact.

methods.name: EnableBanner
methods.summary: Enables the display of the Grasshopper banner during Component loading. The banner is typically only shown once during a Grasshopper session, namely when the Editor is first loaded.

methods.name: EnableSolver
methods.summary: Enables the Grasshopper Solver. If the Solver is enabled, expired components and parameter will be recomputed.

methods.name: HideEditor
methods.summary: Hide the main Grasshopper Editor. If the editor hasn't been loaded or if the Editor is already hidden, nothing will happen.

methods.name: IsEditorLoaded
methods.summary: Returns the loaded state of the Grasshopper Main window.

returns.doc: True if the Main Grasshopper Window has been loaded.

methods.name: IsEditorVisible
methods.summary: Returns the visible state of the Grasshopper Main window.

returns.doc: True if the Main Grasshopper Window has been loaded and is visible.

methods.name: IsSolverEnabled
methods.summary: Returns the state of the Grasshopper Solver.

returns.doc: True if the Grasshopper Solver is enabled.

methods.name: LoadEditor
methods.summary: Load the main Grasshopper Editor. If the editor has already been loaded nothing will happen.

methods.name: LoadedPluginGuids
methods.summary: Gets an array of the IDs of all loaded plugins.

methods.name: LoadedPluginNames
methods.summary: Gets an array of the names and versions (if known) of all loaded plugins.

methods.name: OpenDocument
methods.summary: Open a Grasshopper document. The editor will be loaded if necessary, but it will not be automatically shown.

params.name: filename
params.doc: Path of file to open (must be a *.gh or *.ghx extension).

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RunAsCommand
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Please use RunInCommandContext")] public Result RunAsCommand(GH_Document ghDoc, Command command, RhinoDoc rhinoDoc, RunMode mode)
methods.summary: Obsolete.

methods.name: RunInCommandContext
methods.signature: public Result RunInCommandContext(GH_Document ghDoc, Command command, RhinoDoc rhinoDoc, RunMode mode)

methods.name: RunSolver
methods.summary: Runs the solver once, even if the global solver lock is on.

params.name: expireAllObjects
params.doc: If true, will expire all objects in the current document.

methods.name: SaveDocument
methods.summary: Save the currently active Grasshopper document. If the active document has never been saved, a Save... dialog will be shown. If there is no active document, nothing will happen.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SaveDocumentAs
methods.summary: Save the currently active Grasshopper document in a specific location. If there is no active document, nothing will happen.

params.name: filename
params.doc: Path of file to save to (must be a *.gh or *ghx extension).

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetSliderRangeAndValue
methods.signature: public bool SetSliderRangeAndValue(string sliderID, double value, double minimum, double maximum)
methods.summary: Find a slider and assign a new value.

params.name: value
params.doc: New value. If the value exceeds the limits, it will be clipped.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetSliderValue
methods.signature: public bool SetSliderValue(string sliderID, double value)
methods.summary: Find a slider and assign a new value.

params.name: value
params.doc: New value. If the value exceeds the limits, it will be clipped.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ShowEditor
methods.summary: Show the main Grasshopper Editor. The editor will be loaded first if needed. If the Editor is already on screen, nothing will happen.
